Katiniutiwewienita wurunitsekɨ tita mɨreuyewekai: naxi yetsame, 'itɨ 'amɨpa, tepɨa manuxɨte, tepɨa 'amɨpa manuxutetɨka, meta tɨɨ yayatsame.
Mawari matitaiyarɨwa hetɨa mieme kaniutawewieni 'ayexaxawame wurunitsekɨ wewiyakame, tenimeyari hetɨa kaniyemani, kemawekai hixɨapa 'uyemakame.
Wurunitse hanirayari naukame kaniutiwewieni, memanaxɨanikɨ naitsata mayexaxawa 'etsikinayaritsie, kɨyexi mana muye'unikɨ,
kɨyexi xexeurawime kaniutiwewieni 'akatsiya kɨyeyarikɨ, wurunitse kanitiwirieni herie
manuyexaxawatsie kaneiyehatɨaxɨani, naitsata heitituatɨkaitɨ kanayani mɨkɨkɨ mukukweiyanenikɨ. Mawari taiyame yutaɨta puxawakai mexakɨ pɨwewiyakai.

'Ukarawetsixi 'ixuriki tukiyari kitenie memɨte'uximayakai wurunitse xikɨriyari mekani'atɨirieni, mɨkɨkɨ kanitawewieni maimawame meta 'ɨkaya hetsiena muyemare. Takwa timieme (Mem 38:9-20 – Mem 27:9-19)
'Ariketa takwa 'amakuyewa mekaniutawewieni. Tatsutɨa hepatsie huta tewiyari heimana 'auxɨwi meturuyari pɨtewikai, rinu 'ixurikiyari 'aixɨa mɨ'anene pawɨtɨkatei,
kɨyexi muka'utɨka xeitewiyari pexeiyakai, meta xeitewiyari wurunitse tepɨayari hetɨana mieme, pɨrata kwatsituraiyari hexeiyatɨkaime kɨyexi meta hanira.

Tapata tayeta hepatsie huta tewiyari heimana 'auxɨwi meturuyari pɨtewikai, xeitewiyari muka'utɨka kɨyexi pexeiyakai, xeitewiyarita wurunitse tepɨayari hetɨana mieme, pɨrata kwatsituraiyari hexeiyatɨkaime kɨyexi meta hanira.

'Etsimeuyewatsie tau makayuyuipike hepatsie xeitewiyari heimana huta meturuyari heimana 'imeriyu patayeukai, meta 'ixuriki peuwɨkai meta tamamata kɨyexi muka'uixɨani meta tamamata hetsiena ma'utɨkatei, kɨyexi pɨrata kwatsituraiyari pexeiyatɨkatei.
Tau manatineika hepatsieta, xeitewiyari heimana huta meturuyari heimana 'imeriyu patayeukai.
Mɨranutakɨkatɨretsieta tapa 'ixuriki peuwɨkai 'atahuta meturuyari 'ayetɨtɨ, haikatɨ kɨyexi muka'utɨka, meta haikatɨ hetsiena ma'uni,
meta tapatsieta 'ixuriki peuwɨkai 'atahuta meturuyari 'ayetɨtɨ, haikatɨ kɨyexi muka'utɨka, meta haikatɨ hetsiena ma'uni.
'Ixuriki naitɨ maweretɨkatei takwa, mɨkɨ rinu 'ixurikiyari 'aixɨa mɨ'anene kanihɨkɨtɨkaitɨni.

Kɨyexi mutuikatɨka wurunitsekɨ pɨwewiyatɨkatei, kwatsiturai meta hanira kɨyexi hetsie mawetɨkatei pɨratakɨ pɨwewiyatɨkatei, meta mu'uteyatsie pɨratakɨ kaniwiriyarietɨkateitɨni. Naitɨ kɨyexi mukawetɨkatei pɨrata hanirayari pexeiyatɨkatei.

'Ixuriki mɨranutakɨkatɨretsie meuwiekai mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ pɨ'uariekai, kwimɨxetakɨ meta mɨxetakɨ, rinu 'ixurikiyari 'aixɨa mɨ'ane, witsireuku'itsetɨ. 'Atanauka meturuyari pɨtewikai meta huta meturuyari heimana xeitewiyari heimana tamamata tsenitimeturuyari 'atayeutɨ, mɨyatɨniketɨ mɨpaɨ heutitewatɨ, mɨkɨ 'ixuriki takwa mieme hepaɨ,
naukame pexeiyakai kɨyexi muka'uni meta naukame pexeiyakai wurunitse tepɨayari hetɨana mieme. Kwatsituraiyari meta hanirayari pɨratakɨ pɨwewiyatɨkatei, meta mu'uyatsie pɨrata pɨkawiriyarietɨkatei.
Naitɨ mukatsunetɨkatei 'ixuriki manukawere makuwɨrekɨ, meta mana takwa kuraru makatsie mieme wurunitse tepɨayari pɨhɨkɨtɨkatei.

'Ikɨ katinihɨkɨtɨni ketipaɨmemekɨ mɨtiutiwewiya, para tuki muyepatsie tɨratutsie mieme mɨtawewiyanikɨ. Rewitsixi mɨpaɨ mekatenaka'utɨani, Muitsexi mɨpaɨ mɨtiwaru'aitɨakɨ meta 'Itamaxi 'Aruni mawari wewiwame nu'aya yatiwakɨhɨawekaku.
Wetsareri, 'Urihi nu'aya Kuhuxi teukarieya, Kura nuiwarieyatsiemieme, Yawé Muitsexi kemɨtiuta'aitɨakai mɨpaɨ katiniuyurieni naime.

Yaxeikɨata piparewiekai 'Ahurihawi, 'Akitsamaki nu'aya, Rani nuiwarieyatsie mieme, mɨkɨ naime pɨtitiwewiwakai, pɨtitiwipakai muxa huxarieya mɨ'uarietɨkakɨ mɨyɨtsikimawikɨ, kwimɨxetakɨ meta mɨxetakɨ, meta rinu 'ixurikiyarikɨ.
Kepaɨmetɨ muyɨ huru mɨyetuiya, kepauka tuki mutawewiyatsie xeimiriyari kiruyari kaniuyɨni, kemɨti'inɨatakai 'ana tuki.
Pɨrata kememɨteyetua yuxexuitɨ 'ixaheritsixi mekanaka'utsieni, haika miriyari heimana 'auxɨwime tsienituyari (3.500) kiruyari kanayani kemɨti'inɨatakai tuki 'ana.

Yunaitɨ xeitewiyari wiyari memɨhɨtɨkatei mekanaka'utɨarieni, mɨkɨ yunaitɨ mepakɨ 'ataxewime tsienituyari heimana haika miriyari heimana 'auxɨwime tsienituyari heimana huta tewiyari heimana tamamata (603.550), mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ meyupaɨmetɨ mekaniyetuaxɨani yuxexuitɨ, 'ataxewime kɨramuyari pɨrata, tuki 'ana kemɨti'inɨatakai.

Haika miriyari heimana haika tsienituyari kiruyari pɨrata kaniuyɨni, xeitsienituyari kɨyexi mukawetɨka hetɨa mieme mutiwewiya, mɨkɨ xexuitɨ pɨreuhapanakai xeitewiyari heimana tamamata heimana haika kiruyari.
Pɨrata muyuhayewaxɨ putiwewiya kwatsiturai meta hanira kɨyexi muka'uni hetsiemieme, meta mu'uyatsie manutineniere mekaniutiwirieni.
Naitɨ wurunitse kaniyetuiyani huta miriyari heimana haika tsienituyari heimana huta tewiyari kiruyari,
'ixuriki tukiyari kitenie kɨyexi hetsiena ma'uni kaniutiwewiyani, meta mawari taiyariyari wewiwame, mayexaxawa meta naitɨ tita mɨreuyehɨwa,
takwa kuraru makatsie kɨyexi hetsiena ma'uni kaniutiwewiyani meta mukatsunirixɨa tuki hetsiemieme meta kuraru makatsiemieme.

Kemarite mɨti'itsetɨka tukita te'uximayatamete wahetsiemieme, kaniutiwewiyani muxa huxarieya mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ, kwimɨxetakɨ meta mɨxetakɨ mu'uarietɨkakɨ. 'Aruni meta kemariteya kaniutiwewiyani mɨpatsietɨka hetsiena mieme, Yawé Muitsexi kemɨtiuta'aitɨakai. Kamixa mɨpatsie (Mem 39:2-7 – Mem 28:6-14)
Wetsareri 'Aruni kamixaya 'etsimɨnena kaniutawewieni hurukɨ, muxa huxarieya 'uariekame mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ, kwimɨxetakɨ meta mɨxetakɨ, metatsierie rinu 'ixurikiyari 'aixɨa mɨ'anekɨ.
Huru mekaniutitsuna wewerime mekanayeitɨani, 'etsi'atayeyeume mekaniutixiteni kamixatsie kɨmana memɨtewipakɨ muxa huxarieya yunɨkame mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ, kwimɨxetakɨ meta mɨxetakɨ meta rinukɨ.
Naiparieyatsie mieme wiwieri meputiwewi kamixa hetsiemieme naitsata kanakayaxixɨani.

Mɨkɨ hɨiyameya yaxeikɨa 'anemekɨ kaniwewiyakaitɨni, mɨkɨ naitɨ puyuxewiriyakai kamixa matɨa, hurukɨ kaniwewiyakaitɨni meta muxa huxarieya mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ, kwimɨxetakɨ meta mɨxetakɨ, metatsiere rinu 'ixurikiyari 'aixɨa mɨ'anekɨ, mɨpaɨ katiniuyurieni Muitsexi Yawé kemɨtita'aitɨa.
'Unitse teteyari mekaneuyatsaxɨani huru hetsie, mɨkɨtsie meha'utɨkaime 'Ixaheri niwemama, tseyu kemɨtiwewiwa hepaɨ.
Hikɨ kamixa 'etsimɨnena wiwierieyatsie mekanekayatsaxɨani, para 'Ixaheri tɨɨriyamama mema'eriwanikɨ, Yawé Muitsexi kemɨtita'aitɨa. Kuka tawitsie mieme (Mem 39:8-21 – Mem 28:15-28)

Wetsareri kuka kaniutawewieni tawitsie mieme, pɨ'itsekai kamixa 'etsimɨnena hepaɨ, huru hiruyarikɨ xuiyakame, muxa huxarieya mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ, kwimɨxetakɨ meta mɨxetakɨ metatsiere rinu 'ixurikiyari 'aixɨa mɨ'anekɨ pɨwewiyakai,
payehutakai, yaxeikɨa heutatetewatɨ, xeitewiyari tsenitimeturuyari heutatetewatɨ.
Mana peuyatsarie tetexi witsimɨ'anene naukakɨa panukutetɨkatei. Matɨari miemetsie mana patekai tetexi witsi'anenetɨ xetamekɨ, taxaɨyemekɨ, meta tsiɨraɨyemekɨ 'utimerɨkatɨkaitɨ.
Hutarieka manukukatsie, yuawitɨ tsiɨrauyemekɨ, yuawimekɨ mukutuxie meta tuxamekɨ mutimerɨka.
Hairieka miemetsieta, merie xetatɨ taxaɨyetɨ, tuxamekɨ kapemaɨyemekɨ meta yɨtsikimaɨyetɨ.
Naurieka mukukatsieta, taxaɨyetɨ, kwimɨyɨwi, meta tsiɨraɨyetɨ. Mɨkɨ hurutsie witsimɨ'anene pamanekai,
tamamata heimana huta teteyari pɨhɨkɨtɨkai, mɨkɨ xexuitɨ 'Ixaheri niwemama pɨwa'inɨaritɨkai, tamamata heimana huta nuiwarite mepa'utɨkatei tseyu hepaɨ.
Hurukɨ kuka wiwieriyari kaniutiwewiyani, tsarietɨkaitɨ yatɨtɨ.
Hutatɨ hanira hurukɨ kaniutiwewiyani meta witsi'anenetɨ hetsiena meumarixɨanikɨ, kuka mutatsikuritɨkatsie,
hikɨ mana kanewɨtɨaxɨani huru kaunariyari, haniratsie kaneuyehaxɨani kuka hetsie mamanetɨkatsie,
mɨkɨ huru kaunariyari hutame mayexaxawatsie kenewiyatsitɨaxɨa kamixa 'etsimɨnenatsie hɨxiena mɨkatɨre.
Tawarita hutatɨ hanira hurukɨ kaniutiwewiyani, kanewɨtɨaxɨani kuka taɨta miemetsie kamixa 'etsimɨnena hetsie.
Tawarita hutame hanira kaniutiwewieni hurukɨ, naiparie mukaneniere kanawɨtɨariexɨani kamixa mɨpatsie hɨiyameyari manakuka 'aurie.

Muxa huxarieya witayarikɨ mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ mɨkɨ hanira mekaniutiwiwitɨani, kamixa mɨpatsie hanirayari meta kuka hanirayari mekaniuhɨaxɨani, kuka hɨiyameyari manukuka muyuhayewanikɨ, mɨkakuyuanenikɨ kamixa mɨpatsietsie, Yawé Muitsexi kemɨtita'aitɨakai. Hipameta wakemari mawari wewiwamete (Mem 39:22-31 – Mem 28:31-43)
Wetsareri 'ixuriki mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ kamixa 'etsimɨnena mɨpatsie kaniutawewieni 'itsariekamekɨ, kamixa 'etsimɨnena heima mieme.
Hixɨapa hewatitenime kaniuyurieni, mu'u rewatinakeme, muwatixawatsie 'atatenime mɨkayetsanikenikɨ.
'Ixuriki tenimeyaritsie petayatsaxɨ putuni, yɨtsikimawime, kwimɨxetakɨ, mɨxetakɨ, meta rinu 'ixurikiyarikɨ 'aixɨa mɨ'ane.
Meta kapana 'etsipepeme hurukɨ xeikɨa wewiyatɨkaime, tenimeyaritsie kanatawɨre, putunite matawɨrixɨa tsata.
Kapana 'etsimupepe meta putunite kanatawɨre 'anayeyaxiketɨ, mɨkɨ 'ixuriki tenimeyaritsie, ti'uximayatame menakatɨni hetsiemieme, Yawé Muitsexi kemɨrahɨawekai.
'Aruni hetsiemieme meta niwemama wahetsiemieme, kamixa kaniutiwewiyani 'amɨtɨtɨ rinukɨ 'itsarietɨkaitɨ.
Kamixa meta mukuretsi rinu 'ixurikiyari pepɨyurieni, hɨiyame 'itsarietɨ pɨyuwiyani naitɨ.
Hɨiyame rinu 'ixurikiyari kanihɨkɨtɨkaitɨni 'aixɨa mɨ'anekɨ 'itsarietɨ mɨyɨtsikimaɨyekɨ, kwimɨxetakɨ meta mɨxetakɨ, Yawé Muitsexi kemɨtiuta'aitɨa.
Huru tepɨayari mɨpatsie 'etsiyeume tseyu hepaɨ 'anekame kaniutawewieni, mana katineu'utsieni, «Mɨpatsie Yawé hetsiemieme».
Hikɨ muxa witayarikɨ yɨtsikimaɨyemekɨ kaniuwiwitɨarieni mukuretsitsie makuwierekɨ, Yawé Muitsexi kemɨtiuta'aitɨa. Muitsexi tuki 'unɨrieku kemɨtiutixei (Mem 39:32-41 – Mem 35:10-19)
Naitɨ tuki kaniunɨrieni, 'ixaheritsixi yamekateniwewieni Yawé kehepaɨ 'anekame Muitsexi muta'aitɨakai,
Muitsexi kaniuxeitsitɨarieni tuki, heimana manuka'eimire, 'ixuriki 'amɨyeyeu meta muwa mɨtiyepine, kwatsiturai, mexate 'amatayeyeu, manukuhini, muka'uni meta hetsiena ma'uni,
muxatsi wanawiyari 'ɨkariyari mɨxeta, ketsɨte 'amemɨpapa wanawiyari 'ɨkariyari meta 'ixuriki kakuni meukunakai,
kakuni meta kɨyexi hetsiena manukuhe meta kanamikieya,
mexa mana rapitɨ tita mana mɨtimieme meta paa yamɨramane,
kɨxeme 'uitɨwame hurukɨ xeikɨa mɨwewiya meta kɨxeme manuye'u metatsiere tita mana mɨtimieme, meta hatseiti kɨxeme hetsiemieme.
Mawari taiyame hurukɨ xeikɨa mɨwewiya, 'ɨkwa witsimu'ɨa, hatseiti mu'utsie mieme mɨpatsie meta 'ixuriki tuki kitenie mieme,
mawari taiyariyari wewiwame wurunitsekɨ mɨwewiya meta mayexaxawa hexeiyame, kɨyexieya meta naitɨ tita mɨkɨ mɨreuyehɨwa, maimawame meta hetsiena muyema,

takwa kuraru makatsie mieme 'ixuriki mawɨtɨka, kɨyexi muka'utɨka meta hetsiena mawetɨka, 'ixuriki kuraru kitenie meuwie, kaunarite, kɨyexi mukatsutsune kuraru heima mɨranukawerire hetsiemieme, naitɨ tita mɨtiyɨnikekai tuki muyepatsie hetsiemieme 'ixuriki tukiyari,
meta kamixate mɨ'itsarietɨka tukita memɨteta'uximayata wahetsiemieme, meta mawari wewiwame 'Aruni kamixateya mɨpatsietɨka meta niwemama mawari wewiwamete wakamixate.
'Ixaheritsixi yamekateniutiwewieni Yawé kehepaɨ'anekame Muitsexi muta'aitɨakai.
Muitsexi, katiniutixeiya tita mɨtiutiwewiyakai, tiuxeiyaka Yawé kehapaɨ ti'aneneme mɨtita'aitɨakai, 'aixɨa katinixeiya.
Yawé Muitsexi mɨpaɨ katiniutahɨawe:
«Mexɨakame metseriyaritsie meta mexɨakame tukaritsie, tuki muyepatsie keneutawewi, 'ixuriki tukiyari.
Muwa kiita kakuni tɨratuyari keneutateka, 'ixurikikɨ keneukunama.
Meta mexa muwa keneutaketsa 'aixɨa ketineuketsa. Meta tukita keneutaketsa kɨxeme 'uitɨwame, kɨxeme keneutaiyaxɨa.
'Ɨkwa taiyame kakuni hɨxie keneutaketsa, meta 'ixuriki keneuwi tuki kitenietsie.
»Mawari taiyame tuki hɨxie keneutaketsa, 'ixuriki tukiyari hɨxie,
meta maimawame mana keneutaketsa, mawari taiyame meta 'ixuriki tukiyari wahixɨapa, haa meta kenakatu'a hetsiena.
Kuraru kenateka waritanatsie, 'ixuriki meta keneuwi kuraru kitenietsie.
»Hatseiti mɨtiyupatakɨ ketineu'ɨya, tuki keneukawiri meta naime ketineti'ɨya ketita muwa mɨreyepine, para naitɨ tipatsietɨ mɨrayanikɨ piinite.
Hatseiti keneuwirita mawari taiyame meta naime mana mɨtiyepine, tinaitɨ tipatsietɨ mɨrayanikɨ.
Yaxeikɨata maimawame keneuyuri, patsiekame kenayeitɨa meta 'ɨkayari hetsiena muyemare.
»Hikɨ 'Aruni kenanuwitɨkita meta niwemama 'ixuriki tukiyari kitenie, mana meke'uti'ɨwa,
meta 'Aruni kamixate mɨpatsietɨkakɨ keneutikemaritɨa. Hatseiti keneukawiri mɨtiyupata, mɨtita'uximayatakɨ nemawari wewiwame mayanikɨ.
Hikɨta niwemama kamixa 'amɨtɨtɨ keniwaranakatɨtɨa,

mɨkɨta keniwarukawiri hatseiti mɨtiyupatakɨ wapaapa hepaɨ, mɨkɨ memɨteta'uximayatakɨ nemawari wewiwametekɨ. Kememɨte'ukawiriyarie mɨkɨ pɨ'inɨaritɨni yuheyemekɨ wanuiwari 'umemahu nemawari wewiwamete mepɨhɨkɨtɨni».
Muitsexi yapɨtiuyuri naime Yawé kemɨtita'aitɨa.
Mɨpaɨ pauka tuki kaniunɨrieni mexɨakame metseritsie mexɨakame tukaritsie meta hutarieka wiyari 'aye'aku.
Kepauka tuki Muitsexi mukatsutɨa, kɨyexi hetsiena ma'uni kaniuka'uitɨani, mexa 'amatayeyeu na'uitɨatɨyani meta manukuhini, tuki hɨxie kɨyexi kaniuka'uitɨani,
hikɨ 'ixuriki tukitsie kananukawera, heimana tawarita 'a'ayetsuime kananukawera nawi, Yawé kemɨtita'aitɨakai.
Hikɨ Muitsexi, tɨratu maye'uxa xapayari 'utihurieka kakunitsie kanikayeni, meta kɨyexi kananuye'uitɨani, metatsiere kanamikieya kananukamani.
Kakuni tukita kaneutateni, 'ixurikikɨta kaneikunani. Mɨkɨ mɨpaɨ katinikweriwayuriekaitɨni kakuni tɨratuyari, Yawé kemɨtita'aitɨakai.
Muitsexi mexa 'ixuriki tukiyarita 'etsatanatsie kanitikeni tayeta hepatsie, 'ixuriki warita,
Yawé hɨxieta paa kanamana pareku rekumaneme, Yawé kemɨtita'aitɨakai hepaɨ.
Kɨxeme 'uitɨwameta tukita kaneutakeni, mexa hɨxie, tuki 'etsatatsie tatsutɨa muyekatsie,
'anari kɨxeme kaniutaiyaxɨani Yawé hɨxie, Yawé meripaitɨ kemɨtita'aitɨakai.
Meta 'ixuriki tukiyarita mɨratimawatɨre hurukɨ xeikɨa mɨwewiya, 'upaitɨ 'ixuriki meuwie hɨxie kaniutakeni,
mɨkɨtsie 'ɨkwa witsimu'ɨa kaniutaiya, Yawé kemɨtita'aitɨakai.
'Ariketa yatiuyurieka 'ixuriki kaneuwieni tuki kitenie.
Muitsexi meta mawari taiyame 'akaniutakeni 'ixuriki tukiyari kitenietsie, mana mɨkɨtsie mawarika kaniutitaiya meta hatsi mawariyari, Yawé kemɨtita'aitɨakai.
Meta maimawame 'akaniutakeni, 'ixuriki tukiyarita meta mawari taiyame wahixɨapa kanitakeni, haa mɨkɨtsie kanikatuani maimawame,
hikɨ mana Muitsexi 'Aruni meta yunaitɨ niwemama yumamate yu'ɨkate mekaniutihauxini.
Kepauka memeutahakekai 'ixuriki tukiyari kitenie yatɨni kepauka mawari taiyame hetsie 'ahurawa memɨkɨkakai mepɨtimaimawakai, Yawé kemɨtiwa'aitɨakai.
'Ariketa Muitsexi takwa kaniutawewieni tuki warie kematewatɨka meta mawari taiyame, meta kuraru kitenie 'ixuriki kaneuwieni. Muitsexi 'uximayatsika mɨpaɨ katiniutinɨni.
Merikɨtsɨ 'ana kwitɨwa haiwitɨri 'ixuriki tukiyari kananukanani, tukita Yawé xawatɨriyaya kaniuyeyerɨni.
Muitsexi pɨkayɨwekai 'ixuriki tukiyarita meutahani haiwitɨri menukanakaikɨ, meta Yawé xawatɨriyaya tukita mɨhɨnekaikɨ.
Kepauka tuki hetsie haiwitɨri manuku'ekekai, 'ana 'ixaheritsixi mepuyukuha'aritɨwakai mepekɨkakai.
Kepauka haiwitɨri mɨka'anuku'ekekai, mepɨkayɨwawekai memɨyekɨne yukiita kayuwatɨ mepɨtetekai.
Kepauka 'ixaheritsixi memuhukai, Yawé haiwitɨrieya tuki heima kanakatetekekaitɨni tukarikɨ, tɨkarikɨta tai hepaɨ 'anetɨ payeikakai, yunaime 'ixaheritsixi wahɨxie.
